description: A breakdown of income received that does not belong to any other income type.

totalOtherIncome.description: Total of all other income. Defines a monetary value (to 2 decimal places), between 0.00 and 99,999,999,999.99

postCessationIncome.description: A breakdown of income submitted after the relevant income source ceased.

totalPostCessationReceipts.description: Total income submitted after the relevant income source ceased. Defines a monetary value (to 2 decimal places), between 0.00 and 99,999,999,999.99

postCessationReceipts.description: A breakdown of those receipts submitted after the relevant income source ceased.

amount.description: Income submitted after the relevant income source ceased. Defines a monetary value (to 2 decimal places), between 0.00 and 99,999,999,999.99

taxYearIncomeToBeTaxed.description: Tax year of the submitted income. Expects this in the format YYY-YY (e.g. 2023-24 for the 23/24 tax year).

additionalIncome.description: A breakdown of additional taxable income.

totalAdditionalIncome.description: The total amount of additional taxable income. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

propertyIncomeDistributions.description: A breakdown of Property Income Distributions (PIDs) from Real Estate Investment Trusts (REITs) and Property Authorised Investment Funds (PAIFs).

personalInsuranceBenefits.description: A breakdown of personal insurance benefits.

incomeFromUnauthorisedUnitTrust.description: A breakdown of income from unauthorised unit trusts.

profitsFromCertificateOfDeposit.description: A breakdown of profits from certificates of deposit.

nonCashBenefitsFromFormerEmployer.description: A breakdown of non-cash benefits received from a former employer.

authorisedPaymentsFromOverseasPensionSch.description: A breakdown of authorised payments from overseas pension schemes.

taxableAnnualPayments.description: A breakdown of taxable annual payments.

benefitFromPreOwnedAssets.description: A breakdown of benefits arising from pre-owned assets.

totalBenefitFromPreOwnedAssets.description: The total benefit arising from pre-owned assets. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

benefitFromPreOwnedAssetsDetail.description: Details of benefits arising from pre-owned assets.

amountOfBenefit.description: The amount of benefit arising from the pre-owned asset. This value must be between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

amountBeforeTax.description: The total amount before any tax was deducted. Between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

allowableExpenses.description: The total amount of allowable expenses. Between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

lossesBroughtForward.description: Losses brought forward from earlier tax years. Between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.

taxableIncome.description: The taxable income. Between 0 and 99999999999.99 up to 2 decimal places.
